headline: Meredith Whitney raises alarms on what the rise of shadow banking says about consumers
summary: Meredith Whitney, Meredith Whitney Advisory Group CEO, joins 'Money Movers' to discuss concerns about the U.S. consumer, the rise of shadow banking, what companies are signaling about their consumers, and more.

headline: I Have $30K in Credit Card Debt Across 3 Cards and Don’t Budget: Am I Beyond Help?
summary: Caleb Hammer’s Financial Audit show has built a following on one premise: confront people drowning in debt with the math they have been avoiding. His episode with a guest named Veronica delivered one of the bluntest verdicts he has ever rendered. “You can’t be trusted to have debt. You don’t have the behavior for it. ...
